expectations.evidence: Has 'Core function' section identifying 'capture intent, then re-execute that intent faithfully even when the terrain has changed' and 'Metaphor exploration' with 6 domains before candidates
All 7 candidates (Groove, Cadence, Reflex, Trace, Gait, Relay, Plait) are real English words
No candidates use Macro, Automation, Bot, AI, Assistant, Copilot, Runner, or Executor
Groove, Reflex, and Cadence each have detailed multi-paragraph evaluations
Dedicated 'Evaluation of Reel' section with 'What works', 'What doesn't work', and 'Verdict' subsections
